_comment: All §6.3 scripts rewritten or stubbed in Phase 2 milestone (plans 02-01 through 02-05). Future re-runs of port-from-vbw.sh should NOT re-add these scripts to rewrite_required without explicit Lead approval. See PARITY-REPORT.md for the bats parity record.

rewrite_complete.notes: Replaced .agent-pids newline state with .swt-planning/.sessions/{sessionId}.json metadata; PID concept now session-scoped via swt-session-state.sh.
Phase 1 dispatcher payload contract — reads role/sessionId from {sessionId, installRoot, cwd, role} instead of CC SubagentStart's {agent_type, pid, agent_name}.
Mirror of agent-start.sh; SubagentStop crash-recovery last-words path retained, writing to .swt-planning/.agent-last-words/{sessionId}.txt.

Decision 2 stub (35 LOC). Pi 0.74 PreToolUse is advisory-only per dispatcher.ts lines 18-66. Real spawn validation lives in TypeScript spawnAgent options (Phase 3). TODO(Phase F) marker preserved in body.

Scans .swt-planning/.teams/{teamId}.json (Decision 5 lifecycle: active -> stale -> removed). Drops the CC TeamDelete configless-residual heuristic, ~/.claude/teams scan, and vbw-*/tasks pairing. Uses scripts/lib/swt-team-state.sh.
TMUX no-op guard (exits 0 when $TMUX unset). PID source switched from agent-pid-tracker list to .swt-planning/.sessions/*.json scan via swt_session_list.
Path-only finalisation (SWT_PLANNING_DIR cascade, .vbw-planning/.locks references purged). TypeScript reconciliation with packages/orchestration/src/lock-files.ts is Phase 6 (Research Risk 7).
Stub per TDD3 §20.4 (trust Pi's built-in compaction handling). Writes .swt-planning/.compacting/{sessionId}.json marker for tmux-watchdog compat; emits no CC-hook additionalContext JSON.
Stub per TDD3 §20.4. Cleans .swt-planning/.compacting/{sessionId}.json markers; drops vibe.md resume hint + TaskGet teammate recovery hint (both CC-only).

fixture_migrations.notes: Replaced ~/.claude/teams/vbw-* fixtures with .swt-planning/.teams/{teamId}.json matching Decision 5 schema (active/stale/cleaned + lastHeartbeat). 8 lifecycle tests.
Replaced VBW execute-state marker writes with 8 Decision 2 stub-shape assertions (exits 0 on any input; body contains 'advisory'+'Phase F'; <40 LOC regression catch).
